title: 5pcs Stainless Steel Ice Tongs, 6 inch Mini Serving Tongs, Small Sugar Tongs for Food Sweets Bread Cake Kitchen Wedding Party Bar Bucket
features: 【Premium Material】🍩 Mini serving tongs is made of high-quality stainless steel material, which is durable and anti-rust. These ice tongs adopt polished process and there are no burrs on both sides.

【Practical Design】 🥗 Sugar tongs is integrally formed and adopt a U-shaped design, which can provide you with stronger control over food. You can even adjust the width of the sugar tongs freely according to the size of the food.

【Widely Used Serving Tongs】 🧊 This 15cm food tong is a practical tool in your daily life, which can help you to catch some small things such as sugar, ice cubes, tea bags, bread, cookie, fruit, salad, barbecue, sausage, lemon slices, shredded cheeses, etc.

【Multiple Applications】🍡 Small sweet tongs is perfect for supermarket, buffets, cafe, birthday party, wedding, bar, BBQ, restaurant, kitchen, cooking, cocktail party, candy buffet, grocery store, etc. Practical tool for any occasions.
【Great Value Set】🍪 You will get 5pcs ice tongs, the size of each ice tongs is about 6 inch. Every small sugar tong has teeth egde head,convenient for griping on food, not easy to fall down.
description: Specifications: Material: Stainless steel Size: Approx 15cm/5.9inch Color: Silver Features: ①.The sugar tongs are made of stainless steel, the edges are not peaked, durable, resists rust, anti-corrosion. ②.The ice tongs have simple appearance with no redundant , very easy to clean and handle, can be washed by dishwasher. ③.This multifunctional mini utensil tongs can not only use for catching ice cubes in bar, restaurants or milk-tea shops, but also can help you to catch some small things. Package included: 5 x 15cm sugar tongs
